title: Reinsel's Reduction Method for Vector Autoregression (VAR)
description: A flowchart illustrating Gregory C. Reinsel's method for simplifying a high-dimensional Vector Autoregressive (VAR) model into a more parsimonious subset model.
relationships: Start with a Full VAR Model, specify a hypothesis for simplifying its structure, use a Likelihood Ratio Test to statistically validate the reduction, apply Reduced-Rank Estimation techniques to fit the new model, resulting in a Final Parsimonious Model that is simpler and more efficient.
